textByHashes.f9da58bf6b36e416fe0b89a0b0bda6805395ddd5: Welcome my friend to the Old Nite! What can I do for you?
textByHashes.70a8ac01a4e096fe7e073b317726ac7f77b92d1f: Of course I do! I can offer you a big tasty beer, yours for only two coins.
textByHashes.09c8a685a69ef95e580a5d5d810a32b883ee3d9e: No worries, there's a bank just around the corner if you want to grab some coin.
textByHashes.988f59d5d12ad71eca89393b0ad3a5d7623c72e8: It's all part of the aesthetic! Adventurers who've just returned from the fight of their lives don't want a fancy la-de-da establishment like you'd find down south.
textByHashes.48182e5617e4dee8429d981b1429415b2341687f: They want somewhere to relax and have some hearty ale.
textByHashes.4880b142a49b34a47b424812575eacd1af9cf535: Aye it is, because here at the Old Nite, your safety is our lowest priority!
